zh.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion是Einion ap Griffith和Tangwerstl的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion是Einion ap Griffith和Tangwerstl的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: occupational name for a miner, from a diminutive of minier ‘miner’ (see Minier ). This surname is very rare in France; in North America it may thus (also) be an altered form of some other similar (like-sounding) French surname, such as Mignon .

variants.name: Moynihan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Patrick James, Donal, Eamon, Finbarr, Kieran, Niall.

Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muimhneacháin ‘descendant of Muimhneachán’, a diminutive of the byname Muimhneach ‘Munsterman’, i.e. someone belonging to the province of Munster. In Mayo this surname has sometimes been translated into English as Munster . There has been some confusion with Monaghan .

nameMeanings.name: Levon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: This is the Armenian form of   Leon  , but it is used independently as a given name in the U.S., perhaps influenced by the fame of the rock musician,  Levon Helm  (  b. 1942  in Arkansas as Mark Lavon Helm;  d. 2012  in New York), drummer with The Band.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion was born as the son of Einion ap Griffith and Tangwerstl. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion est né, fils d’Einion ap Griffith et Tangwerstl. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion wurde, als Sohn von Einion ap Griffith und Tangwerstl geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion è nato il come figlio di Einion ap Griffith e Tangwerstl. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Levon ap EinionはEinion ap GriffithとTangwerstlの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion(은)는 Einion ap Griffith(와)과 Tangwerstl의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion nasceu filho de Einion ap Griffith e Tangwerstl. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion родился. Его родителей звали Einion ap Griffith и Tangwerstl. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Levon ap Einion nació como hijo de Einion ap Griffith y Tangwerstl. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
